## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX (AI-powered content marketing agency) and Promenaut (new enterprise AI software development company) to explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Promenaut, led by Stephen Murphy, is a new enterprise-focused AI software development company, targeting financial markets and aiming to disrupt enterprise SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered, end-to-end content marketing services, with a focus on creating high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [While Promenaut is still in early stages, there's potential for future collaboration once they've secured Series A funding and have more assets developed](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Topics

### Promenaut's Business Overview

  - [New AI software development company focused on enterprise, especially financial markets](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Aims to disrupt enterprise SaaS by enabling both developers and non-developers to build software](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Initial focus on finance departments, but applicable to any enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Key use case: Replacing manual spreadsheet workflows and legacy systems](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)

### GrowthX's Services and Approach

  - [End-to-end content marketing agency powered by AI technology](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Services include SEO strategy, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Unique AI workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking content](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Team includes industry experts (e.g., former TechCrunch editor)](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Clients include Lovable, Augment Code, and others in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [Two-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
    1.  8-week strategy sprint (can opt out by week 7)
    2.  Growth execution with daily publishing
  - [Starting price: $15K/month for editorial content in phase two](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Additional services (e.g., newsletter, social media) can be added for $9-12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-powered workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Creates detailed personas and audience-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Ensures accuracy and depth through extensive research and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Optimizes for both traditional SEO and AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Potential Partnership Timing

  - [Promenaut is still in early stages, self-funded by Stephen](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [GrowthX typically partners with companies post-seed or Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Stephen plans to secure Series A funding in the next 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [GrowthX has a 4-6 week wait for strategy sprint kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send Stephen a sample Statement of Work (SoW)](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Stephen to keep GrowthX updated on fundraising progress and readiness to engage](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Potential reconnection in 2-3 months after Promenaut secures funding and develops more assets](https://fathom.video/share/iGe7YzzrW6FUozCH5vu82xdRZrdwfwvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
